_comment: Known NFL trades affecting 2026 draft pick ownership. Update this file when trades are confirmed. The pipeline reads this on every run and applies changes idempotently — re-running will not corrupt the traded_from chain.

_schema.new_current_team: str — abbreviation of the team now holding the pick (lowercase)
_schema.traded_from_append: str — team abbreviation to append to the traded_from chain (the previous owner)
_schema.trade_notes: str — human-readable description shown in the UI tooltip
_schema.confirmed_date: str — ISO date when the trade was confirmed (YYYY-MM-DD)

trades.trade_notes: LAR acquired ATL's 2026 1st in trade (ATL sent 2026 1st + other picks to LAR)
NYJ traded Sauce Gardner to IND; IND sent 2026 1st-round pick (pick #16) to NYJ
GB traded Micah Parsons to DAL; DAL received GB's 2026 1st (pick #20) + 2027 1st + Kenny Clark
JAX traded 2026 1st to CLE at 2025 NFL Draft to move up for Travis Hunter
KC traded Trent McDuffie to LAR; LAR sent pick #29 + 3 other picks to KC
HOU traded Laremy Tunsil to WSH; WSH sent 2026 2nd + 2026 4th + other picks to HOU
NYJ traded Quinnen Williams to DAL; DAL sent 2026 2nd + 2027 1st + Mazi Smith to NYJ
CHI traded DJ Moore + 2026 5th to BUF; BUF sent 2026 2nd (pick #60) to CHI
NYJ traded Haason Reddick to PHI; PHI received NYJ's 2026 3rd-round pick
NYG sent 2026 3rd + 2025 picks to HOU in exchange for HOU's 2025 1st-round pick
DAL traded George Pickens + 2027 6th to PIT; PIT sent DAL's 2026 3rd + 2027 5th
DET traded two 2026 3rd-round picks to JAX for WR Isaac TeSlaa at 2025 NFL Draft
MIA traded Jaelan Phillips to PHI; PHI sent 2026 3rd (pick #87) to MIA
HOU sent 2026 3rd to MIA in 2025 draft-day trade (for 2025 picks)
DET's 2026 comp 3rd (Aaron Glenn/Jets HC comp) traded to JAX in Isaac TeSlaa deal
